description: Maps serial codes to the client data mixed into each file. Use this to verify RAG pipeline answers.
test_questions: What is the deal value for Sterling Capital Bank?
What are the main pain points for Nova Health Systems?
Who is the primary contact at Acme Corporation and what is their email?
Which competitors are mentioned for Titan Logistics Group?
What products has BlueSky Retail Group subscribed to?
What is the deal stage for Greenfield Energy Partners?
Who is the account manager for Meridian Technology Solutions?
What are the action items from the most recent meeting involving Atlas Construction?
What is Nexus Pharmaceuticals' primary pain point?
Which accounts are in the Closed Won stage?
What did the speaker say about implementation NPS in the sales meeting?
List all account managers and their assigned accounts
What is the contract value for Sterling Capital Bank and what modules are included?
What escalation issues are mentioned across all accounts?
Compare the deal stages of all 10 clients
ground_truths: The deal value for Sterling Capital Bank is $2,300,000. Sterling Capital Bank is currently in the Legal Review stage.
The main pain points for Nova Health Systems are HIPAA compliance gaps, fragmented patient data, and slow onboarding.
The primary contact at Acme Corporation is Rachel Torres, VP of Operations. Her email is r.torres@acmecorp.com.
The competitors mentioned for Titan Logistics Group are Oracle TMS and SAP.
BlueSky Retail Group has subscribed to CRM Pro and Customer Journey Analytics.
The deal stage for Greenfield Energy Partners is Proposal Sent, with a proposed contract value of $415,000.
The account manager for Meridian Technology Solutions is James Whitfield.
The action item from the most recent Atlas Construction & Engineering meeting is for Chen Li to send an updated proposal to Robert Okafor (COO) by May 23, 2026.
Nexus Pharmaceuticals' primary pain point is sales rep efficiency and field sales visibility.
The accounts in the Closed Won stage are Titan Logistics Group ($1,100,000) and Atlas Construction & Engineering ($780,000).

The speaker said they would add an implementation NPS slide to the deck and send a recap email with the legal response timeline. They also said they would reference the implementation NPS score in the next call.

Account managers and their assigned accounts: Chen Li manages BlueSky Retail Group, Titan Logistics Group, and Atlas Construction & Engineering. Sofia Marchetti manages Sterling Capital Bank, Nova Health Systems, and Nexus Pharmaceuticals. James Whitfield manages Acme Corporation, Meridian Technology Solutions, Pinnacle Education Group, and Greenfield Energy Partners.
The contract value for Sterling Capital Bank is $2,300,000. The proposed modules are CRM Enterprise, Compliance Module, and AI Analytics.

Escalation issues mentioned include: BlueSky Retail Group at risk of losing deal within 3 business days; Meridian Technology Solutions procurement cycle may extend past Q2 deadline requiring executive escalation; Nexus Pharmaceuticals facing Veeva CRM competitive escalation within 5 business days; Nova Health Systems HIPAA compliance and budget constraints; various support tickets marked as Escalated across multiple accounts.

Deal stages of all 10 clients: Acme Corporation - Negotiation ($840,000); Nova Health Systems - Pilot ($290,000); Titan Logistics Group - Closed Won ($1,100,000); Greenfield Energy Partners - Proposal Sent ($415,000); Sterling Capital Bank - Legal Review ($2,300,000); BlueSky Retail Group - Discovery ($560,000); Pinnacle Education Group - Negotiation ($175,000); Nexus Pharmaceuticals - Pilot ($630,000); Atlas Construction & Engineering - Closed Won ($780,000); Meridian Technology Solutions - Technical Evaluation ($320,000).
